# CreateAccessPreview - IAM Access Analyzer

CreateAccessPreview - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_CreateAccessPreview "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_SeeAlso)

CreateAccessPreview
===================

Creates an access preview that allows you to preview IAM Access Analyzer findings for your resource before deploying resource permissions.

Request Syntax
--------------

``PUT /access-preview HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAccessPreview-request-analyzerArn) ": "`string`",    "[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAccessPreview-request-clientToken) ": "`string`",    "[configurations](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAccessPreview-request-configurations) ": {        "`string`" : { ... }    } }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request does not use any URI parameters.

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the account analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 used to generate the access preview. You can only create an access preview for analyzers with an `Account` type and `Active` status.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_RequestSyntax)
**

A client token.

Type: String

Required: No

**[configurations](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_RequestSyntax)
**

Access control configuration for your resource that is used to generate the access preview. The access preview includes findings for external access allowed to the resource with the proposed access control configuration. The configuration must contain exactly one element.

Type: String to [Configuration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Configuration.html)
 object map

Required: Yes

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAccessPreview-response-id) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html#API_CreateAccessPreview_ResponseSyntax)
**

The unique ID for the access preview.

Type: String

Pattern: `[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12}`

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**ConflictException**

A conflict exception error.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The resource type.

HTTP Status Code: 409

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ServiceQuotaExceededException**

Service quote met error.

**resourceId**

The resource ID.

**resourceType**

The resource type.

HTTP Status Code: 402

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAccessPreview)

*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAccessPreview)

# Actions - IAM Access Analyzer

Actions - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_Operations "Open PDF")

Actions
=======

The following actions are supported:

*   [ApplyArchiveRule](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ApplyArchiveRule.html)
    
*   [CancelPolicyGeneration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CancelPolicyGeneration.html)
    
*   [CheckAccessNotGranted](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CheckAccessNotGranted.html)
    
*   [CheckNoNewAccess](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CheckNoNewAccess.html)
    
*   [CheckNoPublicAccess](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CheckNoPublicAccess.html)
    
*   [CreateAccessPreview](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAccessPreview.html)
    
*   [CreateAnalyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html)
    
*   [CreateArchiveRule](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html)
    
*   [DeleteAnalyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html)
    
*   [DeleteArchiveRule](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteArchiveRule.html)
    
*   [GenerateFindingRecommendation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GenerateFindingRecommendation.html)
    
*   [GetAccessPreview](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAccessPreview.html)
    
*   [GetAnalyzedResource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html)
    
*   [GetAnalyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzer.html)
    
*   [GetArchiveRule](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html)
    
*   [GetFinding](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html)

# CreateAnalyzer - IAM Access Analyzer

CreateAnalyzer - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_CreateAnalyzer "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_SeeAlso)

CreateAnalyzer
==============

Creates an analyzer for your account.

Request Syntax
--------------

``PUT /analyzer HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzerName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAnalyzer-request-analyzerName) ": "`string`",    "[archiveRules](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAnalyzer-request-archiveRules) ": [        {           "[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_InlineArchiveRule.html#accessanalyzer-Type-InlineArchiveRule-filter) ": {              "`string`" : {                 "[contains](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-contains) ": [ "`string`" ],                "[eq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-eq) ": [ "`string`" ],                "[exists](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-exists) ": `boolean`,                "[neq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-neq) ": [ "`string`" ]             }          },          "[ruleName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_InlineArchiveRule.html#accessanalyzer-Type-InlineArchiveRule-ruleName) ": "`string`"       }    ],    "[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAnalyzer-request-clientToken) ": "`string`",    "[configuration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAnalyzer-request-configuration) ": { ... },    "[tags](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAnalyzer-request-tags) ": {        "`string`" : "`string`"     },    "[type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAnalyzer-request-type) ": "`string`" }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request does not use any URI parameters.

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[analyzerName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
**

The name of the analyzer to create.

Type: String

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Pattern: `[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.-]*`

Required: Yes

**[archiveRules](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
**

Specifies the archive rules to add for the analyzer. Archive rules automatically archive findings that meet the criteria you define for the rule.

Type: Array of [InlineArchiveRule](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_InlineArchiveRule.html)
 objects

Required: No

**[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
**

A client token.

Type: String

Required: No

**[configuration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
**

Specifies the configuration of the analyzer. If the analyzer is an unused access analyzer, the specified scope of unused access is used for the configuration. If the analyzer is an internal access analyzer, the specified internal access analysis rules are used for the configuration.

Type: [AnalyzerConfiguration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerConfiguration.html)
 object

**Note:** This object is a Union. Only one member of this object can be specified or returned.

Required: No

**[tags](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
**

An array of key-value pairs to apply to the analyzer. You can use the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, `_`, `.`, `/`, `=`, `+`, and `-`.

For the tag key, you can specify a value that is 1 to 128 characters in length and cannot be prefixed with `aws:`.

For the tag value, you can specify a value that is 0 to 256 characters in length.

Type: String to string map

Required: No

**[type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
**

The type of analyzer to create. You can create only one analyzer per account per Region. You can create up to 5 analyzers per organization per Region.

Type: String

Valid Values: `ACCOUNT | ORGANIZATION | ACCOUNT_UNUSED_ACCESS | ORGANIZATION_UNUSED_ACCESS | ACCOUNT_INTERNAL_ACCESS | ORGANIZATION_INTERNAL_ACCESS`

Required: Yes

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[arn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#accessanalyzer-CreateAnalyzer-response-arn) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[arn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateAnalyzer.html#API_CreateAnalyzer_ResponseSyntax)
**

The ARN of the analyzer that was created by the request.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**ConflictException**

A conflict exception error.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The resource type.

HTTP Status Code: 409

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ServiceQuotaExceededException**

Service quote met error.

**resourceId**

The resource ID.

**resourceType**

The resource type.

HTTP Status Code: 402

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for .NET](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/DotNetSDKV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Go v2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForGoV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Java V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForJavaV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for JavaScript V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForJavaScriptV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Kotlin](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForKotlin/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for PHP V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForPHPV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Python](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/boto3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Ruby V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForRubyV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateAnalyzer)

# CreateArchiveRule - IAM Access Analyzer

CreateArchiveRule - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_CreateArchiveRule "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_SeeAlso)

CreateArchiveRule
=================

Creates an archive rule for the specified analyzer. Archive rules automatically archive new findings that meet the criteria you define when you create the rule.

To learn about filter keys that you can use to create an archive rule, see [IAM Access Analyzer filter keys](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-reference-filter-keys.html)
 in the **IAM User Guide**.

Request Syntax
--------------

``PUT /analyzer/`analyzerName`/archive-rule HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#accessanalyzer-CreateArchiveRule-request-clientToken) ": "`string`",    "[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#accessanalyzer-CreateArchiveRule-request-filter) ": {        "`string`" : {           "[contains](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-contains) ": [ "`string`" ],          "[eq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-eq) ": [ "`string`" ],          "[exists](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-exists) ": `boolean`,          "[neq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-neq) ": [ "`string`" ]       }    },    "[ruleName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#accessanalyzer-CreateArchiveRule-request-ruleName) ": "`string`" }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
**

The name of the created analyzer.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Pattern: `[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.-]*`

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
**

A client token.

Type: String

Required: No

**[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
**

The criteria for the rule.

Type: String to [Criterion](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html)
 object map

Required: Yes

**[ruleName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CreateArchiveRule.html#API_CreateArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
**

The name of the rule to create.

Type: String

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Pattern: `[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.-]*`

Required: Yes

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response with an empty HTTP body.

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**ConflictException**

A conflict exception error.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The resource type.

HTTP Status Code: 409

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ServiceQuotaExceededException**

Service quote met error.

**resourceId**

The resource ID.

**resourceType**

The resource type.

HTTP Status Code: 402

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateArchiveRule)
    
*   [AWS SDK for .NET](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/DotNetSDKV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateArchiveRule)
    
*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/CreateArchiveRule)

# DeleteAnalyzer - IAM Access Analyzer

DeleteAnalyzer - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_DeleteAnalyzer "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html#API_DeleteAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html#API_DeleteAnalyzer_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html#API_DeleteAnalyzer_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html#API_DeleteAnalyzer_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html#API_DeleteAnalyzer_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html#API_DeleteAnalyzer_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html#API_DeleteAnalyzer_SeeAlso)

DeleteAnalyzer
==============

Deletes the specified analyzer. When you delete an analyzer, IAM Access Analyzer is disabled for the account or organization in the current or specific Region. All findings that were generated by the analyzer are deleted. You cannot undo this action.

Request Syntax
--------------

``DELETE /analyzer/`analyzerName`?clientToken=`clientToken` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html#API_DeleteAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
**

The name of the analyzer to delete.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Pattern: `[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.-]*`

Required: Yes

**[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteAnalyzer.html#API_DeleteAnalyzer_RequestSyntax)
**

A client token.

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response with an empty HTTP body.

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/DeleteAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for .NET](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/DotNetSDKV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/DeleteAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/DeleteAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Go v2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForGoV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/DeleteAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Java V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForJavaV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/DeleteAnalyzer)
    
*   [AWS SDK for JavaScript V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForJavaScriptV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/DeleteAnalyzer)

[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteArchiveRule.html#API_DeleteArchiveRule_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteArchiveRule.html#API_DeleteArchiveRule_SeeAlso)

DeleteArchiveRule
=================

Deletes the specified archive rule.

Request Syntax
--------------

``DELETE /analyzer/`analyzerName`/archive-rule/`ruleName`?clientToken=`clientToken` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteArchiveRule.html#API_DeleteArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
**

The name of the analyzer that associated with the archive rule to delete.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Pattern: `[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.-]*`

Required: Yes

**[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteArchiveRule.html#API_DeleteArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
**

A client token.

**[ruleName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteArchiveRule.html#API_DeleteArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
**

The name of the rule to delete.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Pattern: `[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.-]*`

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response with an empty HTTP body.

Errors
------

.

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

# GenerateFindingRecommendation - IAM Access Analyzer

GenerateFindingRecommendation - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_GenerateFindingRecommendation "Open PDF")

[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GenerateFindingRecommendation.html#API_GenerateFindingRecommendation_SeeAlso)

GenerateFindingRecommendation
=============================

Creates a recommendation for an unused permissions finding.

Request Syntax
--------------

``POST /recommendation/`id`?analyzerArn=`analyzerArn` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GenerateFindingRecommendation.html#API_GenerateFindingRecommendation_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 used to generate the finding recommendation.

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GenerateFindingRecommendation.html#API_GenerateFindingRecommendation_RequestSyntax)
**

The unique ID for the finding recommendation.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 2048.

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response with an empty HTTP body.

Errors
------

.

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

Internal server error.

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

--------

GetAnalyzedResource - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_GetAnalyzedResource "Open PDF")

[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#API_GetAnalyzedResource_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#API_GetAnalyzedResource_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#API_GetAnalyzedResource_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#API_GetAnalyzedResource_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#API_GetAnalyzedResource_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#API_GetAnalyzedResource_SeeAlso)

GetAnalyzedResource
===================

Retrieves information about a resource that was analyzed.

###### Note

This action is supported only for external access analyzers.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /analyzed-resource?analyzerArn=`analyzerArn`&resourceArn=`resourceArn` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#API_GetAnalyzedResource_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 to retrieve information from.

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[resourceArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#API_GetAnalyzedResource_RequestSyntax)
**

The ARN of the resource to retrieve information about.

Pattern: `arn:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:.*`

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[resource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-GetAnalyzedResource-response-resource) ": {        "[actions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-actions) ": [ "**_string_**" ],       "[analyzedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-analyzedAt) ": "**_string_**",       "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",       "[error](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-error) ": "**_string_**",       "[isPublic](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-isPublic) ": **_boolean_**,       "[resourceArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-resourceArn) ": "**_string_**",       "[resourceOwnerAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-resourceOwnerAccount) ": "**_string_**",       "[resourceType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-resourceType) ": "**_string_**",       "[sharedVia](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-sharedVia) ": [ "**_string_**" ],       "[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-status) ": "**_string_**",       "[updatedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResource-updatedAt) ": "**_string_**"    } }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[resource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAnalyzedResource.html#API_GetAnalyzedResource_ResponseSyntax)
**

An `AnalyzedResource` object that contains information that IAM Access Analyzer found when it analyzed the resource.

Type: [AnalyzedResource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResource.html)
 object

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

See Also
--------

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/GetAnalyzedResource)

GetAccessPreview
================

Retrieves information about an access preview for the specified analyzer.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /access-preview/`accessPreviewId`?analyzerArn=`analyzerArn` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[accessPreviewId](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAccessPreview.html#API_GetAccessPreview_RequestSyntax)
**

The unique ID for the access preview.

Pattern: `[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12}`

Required: Yes

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAccessPreview.html#API_GetAccessPreview_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 used to generate the access preview.

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[accessPreview](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-GetAccessPreview-response-accessPreview) ": {        "[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreview-analyzerArn) ": "**_string_**",       "[configurations](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreview-configurations) ": {           "**_string_**" : { ... }       },       "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreview-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",       "[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreview-id) ": "**_string_**",       "[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreview-status) ": "**_string_**",       "[statusReason](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreview.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreview-statusReason) ": {           "[code](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewStatusReason.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewStatusReason-code) ": "**_string_**"       }    } }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[accessPreview](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetAccessPreview.html#API_GetAccessPreview_ResponseSyntax)
**

An object that contains information about the access preview.

Type: [AccessPreview](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreview.html)
 object

GetAnalyzer
===========

Retrieves information about the specified analyzer.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /analyzer/`analyzerName` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Required: Yes

------------

# GetArchiveRule - IAM Access Analyzer

GetArchiveRule - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_GetArchiveRule "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_SeeAlso)

GetArchiveRule
==============

Retrieves information about an archive rule.

To learn about filter keys that you can use to create an archive rule, see [IAM Access Analyzer filter keys](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-reference-filter-keys.html)
 in the **IAM User Guide**.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /analyzer/`analyzerName`/archive-rule/`ruleName` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
**

The name of the analyzer to retrieve rules from.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Pattern: `[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.-]*`

Required: Yes

**[ruleName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_RequestSyntax)
**

The name of the rule to retrieve.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Pattern: `[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.-]*`

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[archiveRule](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#accessanalyzer-GetArchiveRule-response-archiveRule) ": {        "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-ArchiveRuleSummary-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",       "[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-ArchiveRuleSummary-filter) ": {           "**_string_**" : {              "[contains](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-contains) ": [ "**_string_**" ],             "[eq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-eq) ": [ "**_string_**" ],             "[exists](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-exists) ": **_boolean_**,             "[neq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-neq) ": [ "**_string_**" ]          }       },       "[ruleName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-ArchiveRuleSummary-ruleName) ": "**_string_**",       "[updatedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-ArchiveRuleSummary-updatedAt) ": "**_string_**"    } }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[archiveRule](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetArchiveRule.html#API_GetArchiveRule_ResponseSyntax)
**

Contains information about an archive rule. Archive rules automatically archive new findings that meet the criteria you define when you create the rule.

Type: [ArchiveRuleSummary](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html)
 object

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

--------

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/GetArchiveRule)

# GetFinding - IAM Access Analyzer

GetFinding - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_GetFinding "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_SeeAlso)

GetFinding
==========

Retrieves information about the specified finding. GetFinding and GetFindingV2 both use `access-analyzer:GetFinding` in the `Action` element of an IAM policy statement. You must have permission to perform the `access-analyzer:GetFinding` action.

###### Note

GetFinding is supported only for external access analyzers. You must use GetFindingV2 for internal and unused access analyzers.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /finding/`id`?analyzerArn=`analyzerArn` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 that generated the finding.

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_RequestSyntax)
**

The ID of the finding to retrieve.

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[finding](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#accessanalyzer-GetFinding-response-finding) ": {        "[action](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-action) ": [ "**_string_**" ],       "[analyzedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-analyzedAt) ": "**_string_**",       "[condition](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-condition) ": {           "**_string_**" : "**_string_**"        },       "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",       "[error](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-error) ": "**_string_**",       "[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-id) ": "**_string_**",       "[isPublic](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-isPublic) ": **_boolean_**,       "[principal](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-principal) ": {           "**_string_**" : "**_string_**"        },       "[resource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-resource) ": "**_string_**",       "[resourceControlPolicyRestriction](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-resourceControlPolicyRestriction) ": "**_string_**",       "[resourceOwnerAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-resourceOwnerAccount) ": "**_string_**",       "[resourceType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-resourceType) ": "**_string_**",       "[sources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-sources) ": [           {              "[detail](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSource-detail) ": {                 "[accessPointAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSourceDetail.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSourceDetail-accessPointAccount) ": "**_string_**",                "[accessPointArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSourceDetail.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSourceDetail-accessPointArn) ": "**_string_**"             },             "[type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSource-type) ": "**_string_**"          }       ],       "[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-status) ": "**_string_**",       "[updatedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Finding-updatedAt) ": "**_string_**"    } }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[finding](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFinding.html#API_GetFinding_ResponseSyntax)
**

A `finding` object that contains finding details.

Type: [Finding](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Finding.html)
 object

.

# GetFindingsStatistics - IAM Access Analyzer

GetFindingsStatistics - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_GetFindingsStatistics "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_SeeAlso)

GetFindingsStatistics
=====================

Retrieves a list of aggregated finding statistics for an external access or unused access analyzer.

Request Syntax
--------------

``POST /analyzer/findings/statistics HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingsStatistics-request-analyzerArn) ": "`string`" }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request does not use any URI parameters.

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 used to generate the statistics.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[findingsStatistics](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingsStatistics-response-findingsStatistics) ": [        { ... }    ],    "[lastUpdatedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingsStatistics-response-lastUpdatedAt) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[findingsStatistics](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_ResponseSyntax)
**

A group of external access or unused access findings statistics.

Type: Array of [FindingsStatistics](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingsStatistics.html)
 objects

**[lastUpdatedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingsStatistics.html#API_GetFindingsStatistics_ResponseSyntax)
**

The time at which the retrieval of the findings statistics was last updated. If the findings statistics have not been previously retrieved for the specified analyzer, this field will not be populated.

Type: Timestamp

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**retryAfterSeconds**

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

HTTP Status Code: 400

# GetFindingRecommendation - IAM Access Analyzer

GetFindingRecommendation - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_GetFindingRecommendation "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_SeeAlso)

GetFindingRecommendation
========================

Retrieves information about a finding recommendation for the specified analyzer.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /recommendation/`id`?analyzerArn=`analyzerArn`&maxResults=`maxResults`&nextToken=`nextToken` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 used to generate the finding recommendation.

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_RequestSyntax)
**

The unique ID for the finding recommendation.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 2048.

Required: Yes

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the response.

Valid Range: Minimum value of 1. Maximum value of 1000.

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[completedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingRecommendation-response-completedAt) ": "**_string_**",    "[error](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingRecommendation-response-error) ": {        "[code](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_RecommendationError.html#accessanalyzer-Type-RecommendationError-code) ": "**_string_**",       "[message](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_RecommendationError.html#accessanalyzer-Type-RecommendationError-message) ": "**_string_**"    },    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingRecommendation-response-nextToken) ": "**_string_**",    "[recommendationType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingRecommendation-response-recommendationType) ": "**_string_**",    "[recommendedSteps](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingRecommendation-response-recommendedSteps) ": [        { ... }    ],    "[resourceArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingRecommendation-response-resourceArn) ": "**_string_**",    "[startedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingRecommendation-response-startedAt) ": "**_string_**",    "[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingRecommendation-response-status) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[completedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseSyntax)
**

The time at which the retrieval of the finding recommendation was completed.

Type: Timestamp

**[error](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseSyntax)
**

Detailed information about the reason that the retrieval of a recommendation for the finding failed.

Type: [RecommendationError](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_RecommendationError.html)
 object

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

**[recommendationType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseSyntax)
**

The type of recommendation for the finding.

Type: String

Valid Values: `UnusedPermissionRecommendation`

**[recommendedSteps](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseSyntax)
**

A group of recommended steps for the finding.

Type: Array of [RecommendedStep](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_RecommendedStep.html)
 objects

**[resourceArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseSyntax)
**

The ARN of the resource of the finding.

Type: String

Pattern: `arn:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:.*`

**[startedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseSyntax)
**

The time at which the retrieval of the finding recommendation was started.

Type: Timestamp

**[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingRecommendation.html#API_GetFindingRecommendation_ResponseSyntax)
**

The status of the retrieval of the finding recommendation.

Type: String

Valid Values: `SUCCEEDED | FAILED | IN_PROGRESS`

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

**resourceType**

HTTP Status Code: 404

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

**fieldList**

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

# GetFindingV2 - IAM Access Analyzer

GetFindingV2 - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_GetFindingV2 "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_SeeAlso)

GetFindingV2
============

Retrieves information about the specified finding. GetFinding and GetFindingV2 both use `access-analyzer:GetFinding` in the `Action` element of an IAM policy statement. You must have permission to perform the `access-analyzer:GetFinding` action.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /findingv2/`id`?analyzerArn=`analyzerArn`&maxResults=`maxResults`&nextToken=`nextToken` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 that generated the finding.

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_RequestSyntax)
**

The ID of the finding to retrieve.

Required: Yes

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the response.

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-analyzedAt) ": "**_string_**",    "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",    "[error](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-error) ": "**_string_**",    "[findingDetails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-findingDetails) ": [        { ... }    ],    "[findingType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-findingType) ": "**_string_**",    "[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-id) ": "**_string_**",    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-nextToken) ": "**_string_**",    "[resource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-resource) ": "**_string_**",    "[resourceOwnerAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-resourceOwnerAccount) ": "**_string_**",    "[resourceType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-resourceType) ": "**_string_**",    "[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-status) ": "**_string_**",    "[updatedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#accessanalyzer-GetFindingV2-response-updatedAt) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[analyzedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

The time at which the resource-based policy or IAM entity that generated the finding was analyzed.

Type: Timestamp

**[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

The time at which the finding was created.

Type: Timestamp

**[error](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

An error.

Type: String

**[findingDetails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

A localized message that explains the finding and provides guidance on how to address it.

Type: Array of [FindingDetails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingDetails.html)
 objects

**[findingType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

The type of the finding. For external access analyzers, the type is `ExternalAccess`. For unused access analyzers, the type can be `UnusedIAMRole`, `UnusedIAMUserAccessKey`, `UnusedIAMUserPassword`, or `UnusedPermission`. For internal access analyzers, the type is `InternalAccess`.

Type: String

Valid Values: `ExternalAccess | UnusedIAMRole | UnusedIAMUserAccessKey | UnusedIAMUserPassword | UnusedPermission | InternalAccess`

**[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

The ID of the finding to retrieve.

Type: String

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

**[resource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

The resource that generated the finding.

Type: String

**[resourceOwnerAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

Tye AWS account ID that owns the resource.

Type: String

**[resourceType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

The type of the resource identified in the finding.

Type: String

Valid Values: `AWS::S3::Bucket | AWS::IAM::Role | AWS::SQS::Queue | AWS::Lambda::Function | AWS::Lambda::LayerVersion | AWS::KMS::Key | AWS::SecretsManager::Secret | AWS::EFS::FileSystem | AWS::EC2::Snapshot | AWS::ECR::Repository | AWS::RDS::DBSnapshot | AWS::RDS::DBClusterSnapshot | AWS::SNS::Topic | AWS::S3Express::DirectoryBucket | AWS::DynamoDB::Table | AWS::DynamoDB::Stream | AWS::IAM::User`

**[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

The status of the finding.

Type: String

Valid Values: `ACTIVE | ARCHIVED | RESOLVED`

**[updatedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetFindingV2.html#API_GetFindingV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

The time at which the finding was updated.

Type: Timestamp

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/GetFindingV2)

# GetGeneratedPolicy - IAM Access Analyzer

GetGeneratedPolicy - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_GetGeneratedPolicy "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_SeeAlso)

GetGeneratedPolicy
==================

Retrieves the policy that was generated using `StartPolicyGeneration`.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /policy/generation/`jobId`?includeResourcePlaceholders=`includeResourcePlaceholders`&includeServiceLevelTemplate=`includeServiceLevelTemplate` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[includeResourcePlaceholders](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_RequestSyntax)
**

The level of detail that you want to generate. You can specify whether to generate policies with placeholders for resource ARNs for actions that support resource level granularity in policies.

For example, in the resource section of a policy, you can receive a placeholder such as `"Resource":"arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}"` instead of `"*"`.

**[includeServiceLevelTemplate](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_RequestSyntax)
**

The level of detail that you want to generate. You can specify whether to generate service-level policies.

IAM Access Analyzer uses `iam:servicelastaccessed` to identify services that have been used recently to create this service-level template.

**[jobId](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_GetGeneratedPolicy.html#API_GetGeneratedPolicy_RequestSyntax)
**

The `JobId` that is returned by the `StartPolicyGeneration` operation. The `JobId` can be used with `GetGeneratedPolicy` to retrieve the generated policies or used with `CancelPolicyGeneration` to cancel the policy generation request.

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

# ListAccessPreviewFindings - IAM Access Analyzer

ListAccessPreviewFindings - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_ListAccessPreviewFindings "Open PDF")
