[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#API_ListAccessPreviewFindings_SeeAlso)

ListAccessPreviewFindings
=========================

Retrieves a list of access preview findings generated by the specified access preview.

Request Syntax
--------------

``POST /access-preview/`accessPreviewId` HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListAccessPreviewFindings-request-analyzerArn) ": "`string`",    "[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListAccessPreviewFindings-request-filter) ": {        "`string`" : {           "[contains](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-contains) ": [ "`string`" ],          "[eq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-eq) ": [ "`string`" ],          "[exists](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-exists) ": `boolean`,          "[neq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-neq) ": [ "`string`" ]       }    },    "[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListAccessPreviewFindings-request-maxResults) ": `number`,    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListAccessPreviewFindings-request-nextToken) ": "`string`" }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[accessPreviewId](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#API_ListAccessPreviewFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

The unique ID for the access preview.

Pattern: `[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12}`

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#API_ListAccessPreviewFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 used to generate the access.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#API_ListAccessPreviewFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

Criteria to filter the returned findings.

Type: String to [Criterion](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html)
 object map

Required: No

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#API_ListAccessPreviewFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the response.

Type: Integer

Required: No

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#API_ListAccessPreviewFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

Required: No

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[findings](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviewFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListAccessPreviewFindings-response-findings) ": [        {           "[action](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewFinding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewFinding-action) ": [ "**_string_**" ],          "[changeType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewFinding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewFinding-changeType) ": "**_string_**",          "[condition](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewFinding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewFinding-condition) ": {              "**_string_**" : "**_string_**"           },          "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewFinding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewFinding-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",          "[error](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewFinding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewFinding-error) ": "**_string_**",          "[existingFindingId](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewFinding.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewFinding-existingFindingId) ": "**_string_**", ": "**_string_**", Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**

Type: Array of [AccessPreviewFinding](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewFinding.html)
 objects

**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

# ListAccessPreviews - IAM Access Analyzer

ListAccessPreviews - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_ListAccessPreviews "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_SeeAlso)

ListAccessPreviews
==================

Retrieves a list of access previews for the specified analyzer.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /access-preview?analyzerArn=`analyzerArn`&maxResults=`maxResults`&nextToken=`nextToken` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 used to generate the access preview.

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the response.

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[accessPreviews](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#accessanalyzer-ListAccessPreviews-response-accessPreviews) ": [        {           "[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewSummary-analyzerArn) ": "**_string_**",          "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewSummary-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",          "[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewSummary-id) ": "**_string_**",          "[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewSummary-status) ": "**_string_**",          "[statusReason](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewSummary-statusReason) ": {              "[code](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewStatusReason.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AccessPreviewStatusReason-code) ": "**_string_**"          }       }    ],    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#accessanalyzer-ListAccessPreviews-response-nextToken) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[accessPreviews](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_ResponseSyntax)
**

A list of access previews retrieved for the analyzer.

Type: Array of [AccessPreviewSummary](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewSummary.html)
 objects

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAccessPreviews.html#API_ListAccessPreviews_ResponseSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

# ListAnalyzedResources - IAM Access Analyzer

ListAnalyzedResources - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_ListAnalyzedResources "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_SeeAlso)

ListAnalyzedResources
=====================

Retrieves a list of resources of the specified type that have been analyzed by the specified analyzer.

Request Syntax
--------------

``POST /analyzed-resource HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#accessanalyzer-ListAnalyzedResources-request-analyzerArn) ": "`string`",    "[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#accessanalyzer-ListAnalyzedResources-request-maxResults) ": `number`,    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#accessanalyzer-ListAnalyzedResources-request-nextToken) ": "`string`",    "[resourceType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#accessanalyzer-ListAnalyzedResources-request-resourceType) ": "`string`" }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request does not use any URI parameters.

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 to retrieve a list of analyzed resources from.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the response.

Type: Integer

Required: No

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

Required: No

**[resourceType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_RequestSyntax)
**

The type of resource.

Type: String

Valid Values: `AWS::S3::Bucket | AWS::IAM::Role | AWS::SQS::Queue | AWS::Lambda::Function | AWS::Lambda::LayerVersion | AWS::KMS::Key | AWS::SecretsManager::Secret | AWS::EFS::FileSystem | AWS::EC2::Snapshot | AWS::ECR::Repository | AWS::RDS::DBSnapshot | AWS::RDS::DBClusterSnapshot | AWS::SNS::Topic | AWS::S3Express::DirectoryBucket | AWS::DynamoDB::Table | AWS::DynamoDB::Stream | AWS::IAM::User`

Required: No

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzedResources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#accessanalyzer-ListAnalyzedResources-response-analyzedResources) ": [        {           "[resourceArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResourceSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResourceSummary-resourceArn) ": "**_string_**",          "[resourceOwnerAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResourceSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResourceSummary-resourceOwnerAccount) ": "**_string_**",          "[resourceType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResourceSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzedResourceSummary-resourceType) ": "**_string_**"       }    ],    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#accessanalyzer-ListAnalyzedResources-response-nextToken) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[analyzedResources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_ResponseSyntax)
**

A list of resources that were analyzed.

Type: Array of [AnalyzedResourceSummary](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzedResourceSummary.html)
 objects

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzedResources.html#API_ListAnalyzedResources_ResponseSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

--------

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/ListAnalyzedResources)

ListAnalyzers - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_ListAnalyzers "Open PDF")

[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_SeeAlso)

ListAnalyzers
=============

Retrieves a list of analyzers.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /analyzer?maxResults=`maxResults`&nextToken=`nextToken`&type=`type` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the response.

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

**[type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_RequestSyntax)
**

The type of analyzer.

Valid Values: `ACCOUNT | ORGANIZATION | ACCOUNT_UNUSED_ACCESS | ORGANIZATION_UNUSED_ACCESS | ACCOUNT_INTERNAL_ACCESS | ORGANIZATION_INTERNAL_ACCESS`

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzers](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#accessanalyzer-ListAnalyzers-response-analyzers) ": [        {           "[arn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-arn) ": "**_string_**",          "[configuration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-configuration) ": { ... },          "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",          "[lastResourceAnalyzed](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-lastResourceAnalyzed) ": "**_string_**",          "[lastResourceAnalyzedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-lastResourceAnalyzedAt) ": "**_string_**",          "[name](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-name) ": "**_string_**",          "[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-status) ": "**_string_**",          "[statusReason](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-statusReason) ": {              "[code](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StatusReason.html#accessanalyzer-Type-StatusReason-code) ": "**_string_**"          },          "[tags](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-tags) ": {              "**_string_**" : "**_string_**"           },          "[type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-AnalyzerSummary-type) ": "**_string_**"       }    ],    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#accessanalyzer-ListAnalyzers-response-nextToken) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[analyzers](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_ResponseSyntax)
**

The analyzers retrieved.

Type: Array of [AnalyzerSummary](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AnalyzerSummary.html)
 objects

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListAnalyzers.html#API_ListAnalyzers_ResponseSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

------

.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

# ListArchiveRules - IAM Access Analyzer

ListArchiveRules - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_ListArchiveRules "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_ResponseElements)

[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_SeeAlso)

ListArchiveRules
================

Retrieves a list of archive rules created for the specified analyzer.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /analyzer/`analyzerName`/archive-rule?maxResults=`maxResults`&nextToken=`nextToken` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[analyzerName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_RequestSyntax)
**

The name of the analyzer to retrieve rules from.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1. Maximum length of 255.

Pattern: `[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.-]*`

Required: Yes

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the request.

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[archiveRules](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#accessanalyzer-ListArchiveRules-response-archiveRules) ": [        {           "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-ArchiveRuleSummary-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",          "[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-ArchiveRuleSummary-filter) ": {              "**_string_**" : {                 "[contains](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-contains) ": [ "**_string_**" ],                "[eq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-eq) ": [ "**_string_**" ],                "[exists](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-exists) ": **_boolean_**,                "[neq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-neq) ": [ "**_string_**" ]             }          },          "[ruleName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-ArchiveRuleSummary-ruleName) ": "**_string_**",          "[updatedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-ArchiveRuleSummary-updatedAt) ": "**_string_**"       }    ],    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#accessanalyzer-ListArchiveRules-response-nextToken) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[archiveRules](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_ResponseSyntax)
**

A list of archive rules created for the specified analyzer.

Type: Array of [ArchiveRuleSummary](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ArchiveRuleSummary.html)
 objects

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListArchiveRules.html#API_ListArchiveRules_ResponseSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

Errors
------

.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

HTTP Status Code: 429

**fieldList**

# ListFindings - IAM Access Analyzer

ListFindings - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_ListFindings "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_SeeAlso)

ListFindings
============

Retrieves a list of findings generated by the specified analyzer. ListFindings and ListFindingsV2 both use `access-analyzer:ListFindings` in the `Action` element of an IAM policy statement. You must have permission to perform the `access-analyzer:ListFindings` action.

To learn about filter keys that you can use to retrieve a list of findings, see [IAM Access Analyzer filter keys](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-reference-filter-keys.html)
 in the **IAM User Guide**.

###### Note

ListFindings is supported only for external access analyzers. You must use ListFindingsV2 for internal and unused access analyzers.

Request Syntax
--------------

``POST /finding HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindings-request-analyzerArn) ": "`string`",    "[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindings-request-filter) ": {        "`string`" : {           "[contains](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-contains) ": [ "`string`" ],          "[eq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-eq) ": [ "`string`" ],          "[exists](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-exists) ": `boolean`,          "[neq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-neq) ": [ "`string`" ]       }    },    "[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindings-request-maxResults) ": `number`,    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindings-request-nextToken) ": "`string`",    "[sort](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindings-request-sort) ": {        "[attributeName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_SortCriteria.html#accessanalyzer-Type-SortCriteria-attributeName) ": "`string`",       "[orderBy](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_SortCriteria.html#accessanalyzer-Type-SortCriteria-orderBy) ": "`string`"    } }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request does not use any URI parameters.

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 to retrieve findings from.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

A filter to match for the findings to return.

Type: String to [Criterion](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html)
 object map

Required: No

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the response.

Type: Integer

Required: No

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

Required: No

**[sort](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_RequestSyntax)
**

The sort order for the findings returned.

Type: [SortCriteria](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_SortCriteria.html)
 object

Required: No

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[findings](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindings-response-findings) ": [        {           "[action](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-action) ": [ "**_string_**" ],          "[analyzedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-analyzedAt) ": "**_string_**",          "[condition](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-condition) ": {              "**_string_**" : "**_string_**"           },          "[createdAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-createdAt) ": "**_string_**",          "[error](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-error) ": "**_string_**",          "[id](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-id) ": "**_string_**",          "[isPublic](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-isPublic) ": **_boolean_**,          "[principal](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-principal) ": {              "**_string_**" : "**_string_**"           },          "[resource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-resource) ": "**_string_**",          "[resourceControlPolicyRestriction](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-resourceControlPolicyRestriction) ": "**_string_**",          "[resourceOwnerAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-resourceOwnerAccount) ": "**_string_**",          "[resourceType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-resourceType) ": "**_string_**",          "[sources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-sources) ": [              {                 "[detail](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSource-detail) ": {                    "[accessPointAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSourceDetail.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSourceDetail-accessPointAccount) ": "**_string_**",                   "[accessPointArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSourceDetail.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSourceDetail-accessPointArn) ": "**_string_**"                },                "[type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSource.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSource-type) ": "**_string_**"             }          ],          "[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-status) ": "**_string_**",          "[updatedAt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html#accessanalyzer-Type-FindingSummary-updatedAt) ": "**_string_**"       }    ],    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindings-response-nextToken) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[findings](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_ResponseSyntax)
**

A list of findings retrieved from the analyzer that match the filter criteria specified, if any.

Type: Array of [FindingSummary](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_FindingSummary.html)
 objects

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindings.html#API_ListFindings_ResponseSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

# ListPolicyGenerations - IAM Access Analyzer

ListPolicyGenerations - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_ListPolicyGenerations "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_SeeAlso)

ListPolicyGenerations
=====================

Lists all of the policy generations requested in the last seven days.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /policy/generation?maxResults=`maxResults`&nextToken=`nextToken`&principalArn=`principalArn` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the response.

Valid Range: Minimum value of 1.

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

**[principalArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_RequestSyntax)
**

The ARN of the IAM entity (user or role) for which you are generating a policy. Use this with `ListGeneratedPolicies` to filter the results to only include results for a specific principal.

Pattern: `arn:[^:]*:iam::[^:]*:(role|user)/.{1,576}`

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#accessanalyzer-ListPolicyGenerations-response-nextToken) ": "**_string_**",    "[policyGenerations](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#accessanalyzer-ListPolicyGenerations-response-policyGenerations) ": [        {           "[completedOn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_PolicyGeneration.html#accessanalyzer-Type-PolicyGeneration-completedOn) ": "**_string_**",          "[jobId](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_PolicyGeneration.html#accessanalyzer-Type-PolicyGeneration-jobId) ": "**_string_**",          "[principalArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_PolicyGeneration.html#accessanalyzer-Type-PolicyGeneration-principalArn) ": "**_string_**",          "[startedOn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_PolicyGeneration.html#accessanalyzer-Type-PolicyGeneration-startedOn) ": "**_string_**",          "[status](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_PolicyGeneration.html#accessanalyzer-Type-PolicyGeneration-status) ": "**_string_**"       }    ] }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_ResponseSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

**[policyGenerations](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListPolicyGenerations.html#API_ListPolicyGenerations_ResponseSyntax)
**

A `PolicyGeneration` object that contains details about the generated policy.

Type: Array of [PolicyGeneration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_PolicyGeneration.html)
 objects

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/ListPolicyGenerations)
    
*   [AWS SDK for .NET](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/DotNetSDKV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/ListPolicyGenerations)
    
*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/ListPolicyGenerations)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Go v2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForGoV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/ListPolicyGenerations)

# Access - IAM Access Analyzer

Access - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_Access "Open PDF")

[Contents](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Access.html#API_Access_Contents)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Access.html#API_Access_SeeAlso)

Access
======

Contains information about actions and resources that define permissions to check against a policy.

Contents
--------

**actions**

A list of actions for the access permissions. Any strings that can be used as an action in an IAM policy can be used in the list of actions to check.

Type: Array of strings

Array Members: Minimum number of 0 items. Maximum number of 100 items.

Required: No

**resources**

A list of resources for the access permissions. Any strings that can be used as an Amazon Resource Name (ARN) in an IAM policy can be used in the list of resources to check. You can only use a wildcard in the portion of the ARN that specifies the resource ID.

Type: Array of strings

Array Members: Minimum number of 0 items. Maximum number of 100 items.

Length Constraints: Minimum length of 0. Maximum length of 2048.

Required: No

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/Access)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Java V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForJavaV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/Access)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Ruby V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForRubyV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/Access)
    

[Document Conventions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/docconventions.html)

Data Types

AccessPreview

# ListFindingsV2 - IAM Access Analyzer

ListFindingsV2 - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_ListFindingsV2 "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#API_ListFindingsV2_RequestSyntax)

[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#API_ListFindingsV2_SeeAlso)

ListFindingsV2
==============

Retrieves a list of findings generated by the specified analyzer. ListFindings and ListFindingsV2 both use `access-analyzer:ListFindings` in the `Action` element of an IAM policy statement. You must have permission to perform the `access-analyzer:ListFindings` action.

To learn about filter keys that you can use to retrieve a list of findings, see [IAM Access Analyzer filter keys](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-reference-filter-keys.html)
 in the **IAM User Guide**.

Request Syntax
--------------

``POST /findingv2 HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindingsV2-request-analyzerArn) ": "`string`",    "[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindingsV2-request-filter) ": {        "`string`" : {           "[contains](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-contains) ": [ "`string`" ],          "[eq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-eq) ": [ "`string`" ],          "[exists](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-exists) ": `boolean`,          "[neq](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Criterion-neq) ": [ "`string`" ]       }    },    "[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindingsV2-request-maxResults) ": `number`,    "[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindingsV2-request-nextToken) ": "`string`",    "[sort](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindingsV2-request-sort) ": {        "[attributeName](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_SortCriteria.html#accessanalyzer-Type-SortCriteria-attributeName) ": "`string`",       "[orderBy](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_SortCriteria.html#accessanalyzer-Type-SortCriteria-orderBy) ": "`string`"    } }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request does not use any URI parameters.

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#API_ListFindingsV2_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 to retrieve findings from.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[filter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#API_ListFindingsV2_RequestSyntax)
**

A filter to match for the findings to return.

Type: String to [Criterion](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Criterion.html)
 object map

Required: No

**[maxResults](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#API_ListFindingsV2_RequestSyntax)
**

The maximum number of results to return in the response.

Type: Integer

Required: No

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#API_ListFindingsV2_RequestSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

Required: No

**[sort](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#API_ListFindingsV2_RequestSyntax)
**

The criteria used to sort.

Type: [SortCriteria](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_SortCriteria.html)
 object

Required: No

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[findings](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#accessanalyzer-ListFindingsV2-response-findings)  objects

**[nextToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListFindingsV2.html#API_ListFindingsV2_ResponseSyntax)
**

A token used for pagination of results returned.

Type: String

ListTagsForResource - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_ListTagsForResource "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListTagsForResource.html#API_ListTagsForResource_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListTagsForResource.html#API_ListTagsForResource_RequestParameters)

[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListTagsForResource.html#API_ListTagsForResource_SeeAlso)

ListTagsForResource
===================

Retrieves a list of tags applied to the specified resource.

Request Syntax
--------------

``GET /tags/`resourceArn` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[resourceArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListTagsForResource.html#API_ListTagsForResource_RequestSyntax)
**

The ARN of the resource to retrieve tags from.

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[tags](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListTagsForResource.html#accessanalyzer-ListTagsForResource-response-tags) ": {        "**_string_**" : "**_string_**"     } }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[tags](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_ListTagsForResource.html#API_ListTagsForResource_ResponseSyntax)
**

The tags that are applied to the specified resource.

Type: String to string map

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/ListTagsForResource)

*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/ListTagsForResource)

TagResource
===========

--------------

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[tags](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_TagResource.html#API_TagResource_RequestSyntax)
**

The tags to add to the resource.

Type: String to string map

Required: Yes

-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response with an empty HTTP body.

# StartResourceScan - IAM Access Analyzer

StartResourceScan - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_StartResourceScan "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_SeeAlso)

StartResourceScan
=================

Immediately starts a scan of the policies applied to the specified resource.

###### Note

This action is supported only for external access analyzers.

Request Syntax
--------------

``POST /resource/scan HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#accessanalyzer-StartResourceScan-request-analyzerArn) ": "`string`",    "[resourceArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#accessanalyzer-StartResourceScan-request-resourceArn) ": "`string`",    "[resourceOwnerAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#accessanalyzer-StartResourceScan-request-resourceOwnerAccount) ": "`string`" }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request does not use any URI parameters.

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[analyzerArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_RequestSyntax)
**

The [ARN of the analyzer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-getting-started.html#permission-resources)
 to use to scan the policies applied to the specified resource.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**[resourceArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_RequestSyntax)
**

The ARN of the resource to scan.

Type: String

Pattern: `arn:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:.*`

Required: Yes

**[resourceOwnerAccount](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartResourceScan.html#API_StartResourceScan_RequestSyntax)
**

The AWS account ID that owns the resource. For most AWS resources, the owning account is the account in which the resource was created.

Type: String

Required: No

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response with an empty HTTP body.

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ResourceNotFoundException**

The specified resource could not be found.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The type of the resource.

HTTP Status Code: 404

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS Command Line Interface V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/cli2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)
    
*   [AWS SDK for .NET](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/DotNetSDKV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)
    
*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Go v2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForGoV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Java V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForJavaV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)
    
*   [AWS SDK for JavaScript V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForJavaScriptV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Kotlin](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForKotlin/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)
    
*   [AWS SDK for PHP V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForPHPV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Python](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/boto3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Ruby V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForRubyV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/StartResourceScan)

# AccessPreviewStatusReason - IAM Access Analyzer

AccessPreviewStatusReason - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_AccessPreviewStatusReason "Open PDF")

[Contents](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewStatusReason.html#API_AccessPreviewStatusReason_Contents)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewStatusReason.html#API_AccessPreviewStatusReason_SeeAlso)

AccessPreviewStatusReason
=========================

Provides more details about the current status of the access preview. For example, if the creation of the access preview fails, a `Failed` status is returned. This failure can be due to an internal issue with the analysis or due to an invalid proposed resource configuration.

Contents
--------

**code**

The reason code for the current status of the access preview.

Type: String

Valid Values: `INTERNAL_ERROR | INVALID_CONFIGURATION`

Required: Yes

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/AccessPreviewStatusReason)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Java V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForJavaV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/AccessPreviewStatusReason)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Ruby V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForRubyV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/AccessPreviewStatusReason)
    

[Document Conventions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/docconventions.html)

AccessPreviewSummary

# UntagResource - IAM Access Analyzer

UntagResource - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_UntagResource "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html#API_UntagResource_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html#API_UntagResource_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html#API_UntagResource_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html#API_UntagResource_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html#API_UntagResource_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html#API_UntagResource_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html#API_UntagResource_SeeAlso)

UntagResource
=============

Removes a tag from the specified resource.

Request Syntax
--------------

``DELETE /tags/`resourceArn`?tagKeys=`tagKeys` HTTP/1.1``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request uses the following URI parameters.

**[resourceArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html#API_UntagResource_RequestSyntax)
**

The ARN of the resource to remove the tag from.

Required: Yes

**[tagKeys](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html#API_UntagResource_RequestSyntax)
**

The key for the tag to add.

Required: Yes

Request Body
------------

The request does not have a request body.

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response with an empty HTTP body.

Errors
------

# StartPolicyGeneration - IAM Access Analyzer

StartPolicyGeneration - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_StartPolicyGeneration "Open PDF")

[Request Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_RequestSyntax)
[URI Request Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_RequestParameters)
[Request Body](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_RequestBody)
[Response Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_ResponseSyntax)
[Response Elements](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_ResponseElements)
[Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_Errors)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_SeeAlso)

StartPolicyGeneration
=====================

Starts the policy generation request.

Request Syntax
--------------

``PUT /policy/generation HTTP/1.1 Content-type: application/json  {    "[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#accessanalyzer-StartPolicyGeneration-request-clientToken) ": "`string`",    "[cloudTrailDetails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#accessanalyzer-StartPolicyGeneration-request-cloudTrailDetails) ": {        "[accessRole](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CloudTrailDetails.html#accessanalyzer-Type-CloudTrailDetails-accessRole) ": "`string`",       "[endTime](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CloudTrailDetails.html#accessanalyzer-Type-CloudTrailDetails-endTime) ": "`string`",       "[startTime](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CloudTrailDetails.html#accessanalyzer-Type-CloudTrailDetails-startTime) ": "`string`",       "[trails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CloudTrailDetails.html#accessanalyzer-Type-CloudTrailDetails-trails) ": [           {              "[allRegions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Trail.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Trail-allRegions) ": `boolean`,             "[cloudTrailArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Trail.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Trail-cloudTrailArn) ": "`string`",             "[regions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Trail.html#accessanalyzer-Type-Trail-regions) ": [ "`string`" ]          }       ]    },    "[policyGenerationDetails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#accessanalyzer-StartPolicyGeneration-request-policyGenerationDetails) ": {        "[principalArn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_PolicyGenerationDetails.html#accessanalyzer-Type-PolicyGenerationDetails-principalArn) ": "`string`"    } }``

URI Request Parameters
----------------------

The request does not use any URI parameters.

Request Body
------------

The request accepts the following data in JSON format.

**[clientToken](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_RequestSyntax)
**

A unique, case-sensitive identifier that you provide to ensure the idempotency of the request. Idempotency ensures that an API request completes only once. With an idempotent request, if the original request completes successfully, the subsequent retries with the same client token return the result from the original successful request and they have no additional effect.

If you do not specify a client token, one is automatically generated by the AWS SDK.

Type: String

Required: No

**[cloudTrailDetails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_RequestSyntax)
**

A `CloudTrailDetails` object that contains details about a `Trail` that you want to analyze to generate policies.

Type: [CloudTrailDetails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_CloudTrailDetails.html)
 object

Required: No

**[policyGenerationDetails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_RequestSyntax)
**

Contains the ARN of the IAM entity (user or role) for which you are generating a policy.

Type: [PolicyGenerationDetails](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_PolicyGenerationDetails.html)
 object

Required: Yes

Response Syntax
---------------

`HTTP/1.1 200 Content-type: application/json  {    "[jobId](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#accessanalyzer-StartPolicyGeneration-response-jobId) ": "**_string_**" }`

Response Elements
-----------------

If the action is successful, the service sends back an HTTP 200 response.

The following data is returned in JSON format by the service.

**[jobId](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_StartPolicyGeneration.html#API_StartPolicyGeneration_ResponseSyntax)
**

The `JobId` that is returned by the `StartPolicyGeneration` operation. The `JobId` can be used with `GetGeneratedPolicy` to retrieve the generated policies or used with `CancelPolicyGeneration` to cancel the policy generation request.

Type: String

Errors
------

For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see [Common Errors](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/CommonErrors.html)
.

**AccessDeniedException**

You do not have sufficient access to perform this action.

HTTP Status Code: 403

**ConflictException**

A conflict exception error.

**resourceId**

The ID of the resource.

**resourceType**

The resource type.

HTTP Status Code: 409

**InternalServerException**

Internal server error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 500

**ServiceQuotaExceededException**

Service quote met error.

**resourceId**

The resource ID.

**resourceType**

The resource type.

HTTP Status Code: 402

**ThrottlingException**

Throttling limit exceeded error.

**retryAfterSeconds**

The seconds to wait to retry.

HTTP Status Code: 429

**ValidationException**

Validation exception error.

**fieldList**

A list of fields that didn't validate.

**reason**

The reason for the exception.

HTTP Status Code: 400

--------

# AccessPreview - IAM Access Analyzer

AccessPreview - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_AccessPreview "Open PDF")

[Contents](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreview.html#API_AccessPreview_Contents)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreview.html#API_AccessPreview_SeeAlso)

AccessPreview
=============

Contains information about an access preview.

Contents
--------

**analyzerArn**

The ARN of the analyzer used to generate the access preview.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**configurations**

A map of resource ARNs for the proposed resource configuration.

Type: String to [Configuration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_Configuration.html)
 object map

Required: Yes

**createdAt**

The time at which the access preview was created.

Type: Timestamp

Required: Yes

**id**

The unique ID for the access preview.

Type: String

Pattern: `[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12}`

Required: Yes

**status**

The status of the access preview.

*   `Creating` - The access preview creation is in progress.
    
*   `Completed` - The access preview is complete. You can preview findings for external access to the resource.
    
*   `Failed` - The access preview creation has failed.
    

Type: String

Valid Values: `COMPLETED | CREATING | FAILED`

Required: Yes

**statusReason**

Provides more details about the current status of the access preview.

For example, if the creation of the access preview fails, a `Failed` status is returned. This failure can be due to an internal issue with the analysis or due to an invalid resource configuration.

Type: [AccessPreviewStatusReason](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewStatusReason.html)
 object

Required: No

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/AccessPreview)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Java V2](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForJavaV2/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/AccessPreview)
    
*   [AWS SDK for Ruby V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForRubyV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/AccessPreview)
    

[Document Conventions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/docconventions.html)

Access

# AclGrantee - IAM Access Analyzer

AclGrantee - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_AclGrantee "Open PDF")

[Contents](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AclGrantee.html#API_AclGrantee_Contents)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AclGrantee.html#API_AclGrantee_SeeAlso)

AclGrantee
==========

You specify each grantee as a type-value pair using one of these types. You can specify only one type of grantee. For more information, see [PutBucketAcl](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/API/API_PutBucketAcl.html)
.

Contents
--------

###### Important

This data type is a UNION, so only one of the following members can be specified when used or returned.

**id**

The value specified is the canonical user ID of an AWS account.

Type: String

Required: No

**uri**

Used for granting permissions to a predefined group.

Type: String

Required: No

See Also
--------

For more information about using this API in one of the language-specific AWS SDKs, see the following:

*   [AWS SDK for C++](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForCpp/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/AclGrantee)

*   [AWS SDK for Ruby V3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/goto/SdkForRubyV3/accessanalyzer-2019-11-01/AclGrantee)

AccessPreviewSummary - IAM Access Analyzer

[](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/pdfs/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/access-analyzer-api.pdf#API_AccessPreviewSummary "Open PDF")

[Contents](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewSummary.html#API_AccessPreviewSummary_Contents)
[See Also](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewSummary.html#API_AccessPreviewSummary_SeeAlso)

AccessPreviewSummary
====================

Contains a summary of information about an access preview.

Contents
--------

**analyzerArn**

The ARN of the analyzer used to generate the access preview.

Type: String

Pattern: `[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:[^:]*:analyzer/.{1,255}`

Required: Yes

**createdAt**

The time at which the access preview was created.

Type: Timestamp

Required: Yes

**id**

The unique ID for the access preview.

Type: String

Pattern: `[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12}`

Required: Yes

**status**

The status of the access preview.

*   `Creating` - The access preview creation is in progress.
    
*   `Completed` - The access preview is complete and previews the findings for external access to the resource.
    
*   `Failed` - The access preview creation has failed.
    

Type: String

Valid Values: `COMPLETED | CREATING | FAILED`

Required: Yes

**statusReason**

Provides more details about the current status of the access preview. For example, if the creation of the access preview fails, a `Failed` status is returned. This failure can be due to an internal issue with the analysis or due to an invalid proposed resource configuration.

Type: [AccessPreviewStatusReason](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/access-analyzer/latest/APIReference/API_AccessPreviewStatusReason.html)
 object
